description_long: This cabinetry set consists of two main sections: an upper wall-mounted unit and a lower base unit. The upper section features a light wood finish with three closed cabinet doors and one open shelf compartment, providing both concealed and open storage. The lower section has a sleek black countertop with a built-in circular sink and a recessed area, likely for a cooktop or workspace, and is supported by a matching wood base with multiple doors and drawers. The cabinetry is minimalist in design, with flat panel doors and no visible handles, emphasizing a modern aesthetic. The materials appear to be a combination of wood veneer, laminate, and possibly engineered wood for the structure, with a glossy black surface for the countertop. This cabinetry would be suitable for use in urban environments such as public kitchens, break rooms, or community centers.
description: A modern two-part cabinetry set with a light wood finish, featuring an upper wall-mounted unit with open and closed storage, and a lower base unit with a glossy black countertop, integrated sink, and multiple doors and drawers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry set, including the upper wall-mounted unit with three doors and an open shelf, and the lower base unit with a black countertop, sink, and storage compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of both the upper and lower units, and the overhang of the upper cabinet above the countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both the upper and lower cabinetry sections, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the cabinetry and the alignment between the upper and lower units.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: triple door with open shelf (upper), double door with drawers (lower)
